_comment: Walk-forward book freeze-stamp (v2.4 bake 2026-07-04). The book (s4 matrix) is id(p)-keyed, so raw-file sha256 is non-deterministic across regenerations BY DESIGN; identity is sealed on the STABLE keys (player,type,year,pick), canonicalised. Regeneration-invariance proven at bake time: two fresh builds gave different raw shas but this identical stable-key sha. ship_gates_check.py B3 compares the current S4_MATRIX stable-key sha to this baseline.
